falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on a higher low structure; a break below this level invalidates the floor formation and suggests the 'bottom' was not established, making the HOLD signal on a false premise of stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 implies controlled volatility/declining fear; sustained VIX elevation above 25 indicates panic selling and regime change, directly contradicting the conditions that generated the 79% pattern match to a bottoming structure

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid flight-to-quality rally of this magnitude signals systemic stress or recession repricing, invalidating the macro bottom thesis which assumed stable/rising rates as part of the August 2024 analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
